rows.label: qev011401_MSG0001
rows.name: I really lost a lot of time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Gathering all this by the promised
date... No matter how I look at
it, it's impossible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Sigh, what should I do... At
this rate, no one will ever
give me a mission again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0005
rows.name: Ah... [ST:playername ]-san...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0006
rows.name:
Thank you so much for your
help back then. Thanks to
you, my Doll is fixed, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0007
rows.name:
When I calmly looked over the missions
I've taken on, they're all things I
can't possibly finish in time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0008
rows.name:
I was just reworking my plans
to see what I could do.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask to at least hear the
details of her missions.

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0020
rows.name: Rescue

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0021
rows.name:
Offer a helping hand to assist
Mei with her missions.

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0009
rows.name: Um...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0010
rows.name:
I need to gather Dometom's Old Red Tree
Horns and Flash Divination Rods...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0011
rows.name:
And I also have to gather Strutt's Rich
Black Eggs, which I'm really bad at...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0012
rows.name:
But this one is the worst. I have
to gather... 80 Angel Stones...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0014
rows.name:
...But I decided to do it, so I
have to finish it all by myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0015
rows.name:
I don't know how I'll do it...
but I'll figure something out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0016
rows.name:
Um... thank you for talking
to someone like me again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0017
rows.name:
N-No way... I can't cause
you any more trouble...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0018
rows.name:
Eh...? There's no need to hold back
because we're BLADE comrades?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Comrades. That makes me
really happy to hear...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0020
rows.name:
I'm sorry for being so shameless...
but is it okay if I lean on your
kindness just a little bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0021
rows.name:
The missions I've currently accepted
involve gathering Dometom's Old Red
Tree Horns and Flash Divination Rods...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0022
rows.name:
And a brutal mission to
gather 80 Angel Stones...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0023
rows.name:
Plus, there's also the gathering of
Strutt's Rich Black Eggs... No matter
how I look at it, it's impossible alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0024
rows.name:
Um... Could I ask you to handle two of those things for
me? Gathering Strutt's Rich Black Eggs, and either
Dometom's Old Red Tree Horns or Flash Divination Rods...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0025
rows.name:
I'll take responsibility and finish
the rest of the missions myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0110
rows.name: Dometom's Old Red Tree Horns

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0111
rows.name: Take on this mission.

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0120
rows.name: Flash Divination Rods

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0121
rows.name: Take on this mission.

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0130
rows.name: 80 Angel Stones

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0131
rows.name:
Tell her you'll take on the
hardest-looking mission.

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0026
rows.name: Thank you so much![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0027
rows.name:
Well then, I leave the gathering of Strutt's
Rich Black Eggs and Dometom's Old Red Tree
Horns to you! I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0028
rows.name:
I'll manage to gather all 80
Angel Stones... somehow![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0029
rows.name: Thank you so much![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0030
rows.name:
Well then, I leave the gathering of
Strutt's Rich Black Eggs and Flash
Divination Rods to you! I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0031
rows.name:
I'll manage to gather all 80
Angel Stones... somehow![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0032
rows.name:
N-No! That's no good! I can't possibly
push such a difficult mission onto you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0033
rows.name:
I'll accomplish this even if it
costs me my life! So you just...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0034
rows.name:
Please gather Strutt's Rich Black Eggs
and... Flash Divination Rods for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0035
rows.name:
Being so kind to someone like
me... Thank you so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0036
rows.name:
I'll leave the gathering of
Strutt's Rich Black Eggs and
Dometom's Old Red Tree Horns to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0037
rows.name:
So as not to waste your help... I'll
absolutely gather the rest on my end![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0038
rows.name: How are things going on your end?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0039
rows.name:
Over here... guess what! I was
investigating a seaside cave
I happened to find, and—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0040
rows.name:
75 Angel Stones turned up!
Isn't that quite the haul?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0210
rows.name: Amazement

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0211
rows.name:
Fail to hide your surprise
at Mei's unbelievable luck.

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0220
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0221
rows.name:
Cast a suspicious glance
at her impossible story.

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0041
rows.name:
Y-You don't have to be that
surprised... Things like this
happen to me sometimes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0042
rows.name:
I-It's true! What would I
gain from lying about this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0043
rows.name:
Things like this have happened to me
occasionally ever since I was little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0044
rows.name:
Like when I was small, on my way home from
school, I once found a bag with 100,000 dollars
in it in the mountain behind my house.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0045
rows.name:
Hehe, people from the TV station came
that time, and it was quite an ordeal...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0047
rows.name:
...Oops, I'm sorry, I haven't
even finished my mission yet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0048
rows.name:
Um, how did it go with the Strutt's
Rich Black Eggs and Dometom's Old Red
Tree Horns I left to you, [ST:playername ]-san?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0049
rows.name:
A-Amazing! Meanwhile, I haven't even found
the 2 Flash Divination Rods yet, let alone
the rest of the Angel Stones...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0050
rows.name:
Um... I'm sorry... I feel like
I'm dragging you down...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0051
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0310
rows.name:
Suggest that you go fetch
the remaining items.

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0311
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0320
rows.name:
Scold Mei for being
overly self-conscious.

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0321
rows.name: Oh no, I couldn't possibly go that far—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0052
rows.name:
—Wait, you're right. I'm in this
situation because I keep trying
to shoulder everything alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0053
rows.name:
We're comrades... so I
shouldn't worry about it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0055
rows.name: Um... Thank you for getting mad at me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0056
rows.name:
This is probably why I always failed to
get along with people in the past...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0057
rows.name:
I'm sorry... Then let me
make one more request.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0058
rows.name:
I will absolutely gather the rest
of the Angel Stones myself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0059
rows.name:
So please... get the 2 Flash Divination
Rods for me. Um... I'm counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0060
rows.name:
This is the first time I've
ever done a mission together
with someone like this, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0061
rows.name:
It's a strange feeling. It makes
me feel like I have to work many
times harder than usual.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0062
rows.name:
...I'll leave the Flash Divination
Rods to you. I will absolutely
gather the remaining Angel Stones![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0063
rows.name: Um... [ST:playername ]-san! How did it go?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0064
rows.name:
Did you gather the Flash
Divination Rods?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0065
rows.name: Y-Yay!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0066
rows.name:
Look, I found the rest of the Angel
Stones on my end too... With this,
the missions are complete!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0067
rows.name:
My Doll was broken, and I thought
I'd never be able to finish them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0068
rows.name:
It's amazing... When you join forces
with your comrades, you can accomplish
such incredible things![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0069
rows.name:
I've always worked alone, but I feel
like I finally understand why everyone
forms teams to tackle missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0070
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0410
rows.name:
Advise her to continue working hard
by cooperating with comrades.

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0411
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0420
rows.name:
Bluntly state that you resolved these
missions entirely with your own power.

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0421
rows.name:
Yes! Up until now, I haven't even
been able to properly talk with the
people in my own Union, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0071
rows.name:
From now on, I'll gather my
courage and try doing my best
together with everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0072
rows.name:
Thank you so much! As fellow
BLADE comrades... Let's continue
to join forces from now on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0073
rows.name: Eeeeeh...?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0074
rows.name:
It's true that you basically
solved almost everything with
your own power, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0075
rows.name:
I just didn't think the conversation
was heading that way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0076
rows.name:
...Um, does that mean it's better if I...
keep doing my best alone after all?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0077
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0510
rows.name:
Advise her to use her strong
luck and do her best alone.

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0511
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev011401_JNK0520
rows.name:
Advise her once again to join forces
with everyone and do her best.

rows.label: qev011401_SEL0521
rows.name:
Strong luck...? I thought this
kind of thing was normal, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0078
rows.name:
But, I suppose that really is the most comfortable way for
me... right? I'm sure I'd end up causing a lot of trouble
for the people around me just like I did this time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0079
rows.name:
...Understood. I'll try my best
to manage on my own from now on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0080
rows.name:
Um... if we happen to meet somewhere
again, please at least talk to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0081
rows.name:
R-Right...? Doing a mission
together with you made me realize
just how important that is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0082
rows.name:
From now on, I'll gather my
courage and try doing my best
together with everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0083
rows.name:
Thank you so much! As fellow
BLADE comrades... Let's continue
to join forces from now on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011401_MSG0084
rows.name:
Thanks for everything! I look forward
to teaming up with you again sometime![ST:wait ]
